OKASSEN.import.title: Okassen — Item Import
OKASSEN.import.hint: Paste an extended item JSON (dnd5e + optional _forge block) and press "Create".
OKASSEN.import.targetHint: Target actor UUID (empty = create in the world; a token UUID works too).
OKASSEN.import.folderHint: Where to put the created document. Item folders apply to items, actor folders to NPCs; a mismatched type is ignored.
OKASSEN.import.targetNotFound: No actor found for UUID "{uuid}". Check the UUID (right-click the actor → "Copy UUID") or leave the field empty.
OKASSEN.import.success: Item "{name}" created. You can paste the next JSON.
OKASSEN.import.actorSuccess: Actor "{name}" created. You can paste the next JSON.
OKASSEN.notify.wrongSystem: Okassen: this module targets the dnd5e system — mechanics will not work in the current system.
OKASSEN.notify.actorItemsFailed: Okassen: failed to create some items on actor "{name}": {items}. Everything else was created.
OKASSEN.notify.nestedTooDeep: Okassen: nested items deeper than 2 levels on "{name}" were ignored.
OKASSEN.notify.nestedFailed: Okassen: failed to create nested item "{name}" — the rest of the import continued.
OKASSEN.notify.onUseUnregistered: Okassen: onUse handler "{handler}" (item "{item}") is not registered. The item was created, but its on-use logic will not fire until the handler is added via api.registerHandler.
OKASSEN.errors.notAnObject: The input must be a JSON item object (not an array or a string).
OKASSEN.errors.noName: The item is missing the required "name" field.
OKASSEN.errors.noType: Item "{name}" is missing the required "type" field.
OKASSEN.errors.badType: Unknown item type "{type}" on "{name}". Valid types: {types}.
OKASSEN.errors.badForge: The "_forge" block on "{name}" must be an object.
OKASSEN.errors.badOnUse: "_forge.onUse" on "{name}" must be a handler-id string or null.
OKASSEN.errors.badChange: Effect "{effect}" has a change without "mechanic" and without a "key" + "mode" pair — nothing to apply.
OKASSEN.errors.noValue: Effect "{effect}" has a change with no "value".
OKASSEN.errors.advantageNeedsMidi: Mechanic "{mechanic}" is not supported: plain dnd5e has no Active Effect flags for advantage/disadvantage (except advantage.init for initiative). Such effects require the midi-qol module (flags.midi-qol.advantage.*) — you can pass its key as a raw change via key + mode.
OKASSEN.errors.mechanicNeedsMidi: Mechanic "{mechanic}" only works with midi-qol active — plain dnd5e has no such flag. Enable midi-qol or drop the mechanic.
OKASSEN.errors.badSetValue: Mechanic "{mechanic}": value "{value}" is not a valid key. Allowed values: {allowed}.
OKASSEN.errors.targetNotActor: The import target is not an actor.
OKASSEN.errors.actorNoNested: Actor "{name}": "_forge.nested" is not supported on actors — actor items go in the standard "items" array (each may have its own _forge).
OKASSEN.errors.actorNoOnUse: Actor "{name}": "_forge.onUse" is not supported on actors — set onUse on specific items in the "items" array.
OKASSEN.errors.itemsNotArray: "items" on "{name}" must be an array of items.
OKASSEN.export.needUuid: To export, paste an item or actor UUID into the UUID field (right-click the document → "Copy UUID") and press "Export" again.
OKASSEN.export.notItem: Document "{uuid}" not found or is not an item/actor.
OKASSEN.export.done: Exported "{name}". The JSON is in the editor — ready to copy.
OKASSEN.export.tabHint: Turn an existing document into Okassen JSON. Paste its UUID (or a folder / compendium id) and press Export — the result lands in the editor on the Import tab.
OKASSEN.export.tabDetail: Item / actor UUID → one JSON object. A Folder.xxxx UUID or a compendium id (e.g. world.my-items) → the whole set as a JSON array.
OKASSEN.export.contextTip: Tip: right-click a document in the sidebar → "Okassen Export (JSON)" to export it straight into this window.
OKASSEN.export.desc: Turn an existing item, actor, folder or compendium into JSON.
OKASSEN.dup.title: Item already exists
OKASSEN.dup.content: Item "{name}" (type: {type}) already exists. What should happen?
OKASSEN.guide.title: Okassen — Import Guide
OKASSEN.guide.desc: Open the in-world guide journal with format reference and examples.
OKASSEN.preview.desc: Dry run: validate the JSON and expand effects without creating anything.
OKASSEN.url.desc: Fetch JSON from a link (gist / GitHub raw) into the editor.
OKASSEN.history.desc: Undoable log of everything imported from this window.
OKASSEN.handlers.desc: Browse onUse / lifecycle handlers and where documents reference them.
OKASSEN.import.packHint: Create the document directly in a compendium. Locked packs are disabled; folders and duplicate detection do not apply inside packs.
OKASSEN.notify.hookUnregistered: Okassen: handler "{handler}" ({hook} hook, "{name}") is not registered. The logic will not fire until it exists (api.registerHandler or an okassen:{handler} macro).
OKASSEN.errors.badHook: "_forge.{hook}" on "{name}" must be a handler-id string.
OKASSEN.errors.actorBadHook: Actor "{name}": hook "{hook}" is not supported on actors — only onTurnStart and onTurnEnd are.
OKASSEN.errors.overTimeFormula: Mechanic "{mechanic}": "value" must be a formula string or a number.
OKASSEN.errors.overTimeType: Mechanic "{mechanic}": required field "type" must be a damage type. Allowed: {allowed}.
OKASSEN.errors.overTimeSaveAbility: Mechanic "{mechanic}": "save" must be an ability abbreviation. Allowed: {allowed}.
OKASSEN.errors.overTimeCondition: Mechanic "{mechanic}": "condition" must be a midi-qol expression string.
OKASSEN.errors.applyToNotArray: Effect "{effect}": "applyTo" must be an array of activity ids.
OKASSEN.errors.applyToBadRef: Effect "{effect}": each "applyTo" entry must be an activity-id string or an object with an "activity" field.
OKASSEN.errors.statusesBad: Effect "{effect}": "statuses" must be an array of strings (status ids).
OKASSEN.errors.refTooDeep: $ref expansion is too deep — check _defs for self-nesting.
OKASSEN.errors.refNotMergeable: "$ref: {name}" has overrides, but the snippet is not an object — nothing to merge into.
OKASSEN.errors.unknownVar: Expression "{expr}": variable "{name}" is not declared in _vars.
OKASSEN.errors.unknownFunc: Expression "{expr}": unknown function "{func}" (available: floor, ceil, round, abs, min, max).
OKASSEN.errors.exprNotNumber: Expression "{expr}": value "{value}" is not a number — arithmetic does not apply.
OKASSEN.errors.packLocked: Compendium "{pack}" is locked — unlock it (right-click the pack → Toggle Edit Lock) or pick another.
OKASSEN.deps.midiKey: {where}: key {key} requires the midi-qol module, which is not active — the change will silently do nothing.
OKASSEN.deps.daeKey: {where}: key {key} requires the DAE module, which is not active — the change will silently do nothing.
OKASSEN.deps.advantage: {where}: mechanic "{mechanic}" requires midi-qol, which is not active.
OKASSEN.deps.overTimeSave: {where}: the overTime save (save/dc) only works with midi-qol — without it the damage will apply with no save.
OKASSEN.deps.specialDuration: {where}: special durations like "1Attack" (flags.dae.specialDuration) are a Times-Up trigger flag (Foundry v13). There is no Times-Up for v14, and core does not guarantee that specific trigger. Use a plain duration (rounds/turns) — core v14+ removes it — or check whether your DAE build supports the flag.
OKASSEN.deps.timedNoTimesUp: Effect durations (rounds/turns/seconds) remove themselves on Foundry v14+ core or with the Times-Up module (v13). Neither was found — dnd5e only shows a countdown and the effect stays until removed by hand.
OKASSEN.schema.unknownFields: "{name}": fields are not in the dnd5e schema, Foundry will silently drop them: {fields}.
OKASSEN.editor.turnStart: at the start of the turn
OKASSEN.editor.turnEnd: at the end of the turn
OKASSEN.history.title: Okassen — Import History
OKASSEN.history.empty: History is empty — no imports from this window yet.
OKASSEN.history.confirm: Delete everything this import created and restore what it replaced?
OKASSEN.preview.title: Okassen — Preview (nothing created)
OKASSEN.preview.note: Dry run: {count} document(s). This is how they will be built on import.
OKASSEN.url.title: Okassen — Load JSON from a link
OKASSEN.url.hint: A direct link to JSON (gist/GitHub raw link etc.). The file is only placed into the editor — importing stays up to you.
OKASSEN.url.done: Loaded: {url}. Check the JSON and press "Create".
OKASSEN.url.error: Failed to load: {message}. A common cause is CORS: the server refuses browser requests; use a gist/GitHub raw link.
OKASSEN.handlers.title: Okassen — onUse & Hook Handlers
OKASSEN.handlers.hint: All known handlers and the world documents that reference them.
OKASSEN.handlers.empty: No handlers: none in the API registry, no "okassen:<id>" macros, no references in documents.
OKASSEN.dup.noDiff: No data differences found (name/img/system and effects match).
OKASSEN.export.bulkDone: Exported {count} documents ("{name}"). The JSON array is in the editor.
OKASSEN.export.packBadType: Compendium "{pack}" does not contain items or actors.
OKASSEN.export.folderBadType: Folder "{name}" is not an item or actor folder.
OKASSEN.mech.hp-temp: Temporary HP: at least N while the effect is active
OKASSEN.mech.damage-overTime: Damage over combat turns: value is a formula; fields type/turn/save/dc/condition
OKASSEN.mech.heal-overTime: Healing over combat turns: value is a formula; fields turn/condition
OKASSEN.mech.grants-advantage-attack-all: midi: attackers hit the bearer with advantage
OKASSEN.mech.grants-disadvantage-attack-: midi: attackers hit the bearer with disadvantage
OKASSEN.mech.fail-save-all: midi: bearer automatically fails saving throws
OKASSEN.mech.fail-check-all: midi: bearer automatically fails ability checks
OKASSEN.mech.dr-all: midi: flat reduction of all incoming damage (number)
OKASSEN.dest.title: Destination
OKASSEN.export.tabHint: Paste a document UUID (or a compendium id) and press "Export". The extended JSON appears in the editor on the "Import" tab — copy it from there or re-import it right away.
OKASSEN.export.uuidLabel: Item / actor / folder UUID or compendium id
OKASSEN.export.tabTargets: An item or actor exports as a single JSON; a folder (Folder.xxx) with subfolders or a compendium id (world.my-items) exports as a JSON array. Right-click the document → "Copy UUID".
OKASSEN.preview.tabEmpty: Paste JSON on the "Import" tab and press "Run preview" — a dry run appears here, creating nothing.
OKASSEN.settings.note: Dependencies are optional: without midi-qol/DAE effects and nested items still work, but some mechanics (advantage/disadvantage, overTime saves) will not — the import warns about this.
